headline: A Look At O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Valuation After Strong Q1 2026 Update And Raised Guidance
summary: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) is back in focus after Q1 2026 results showed revenue of US$4.56b and operating income of US$842m, along with updated guidance and solid support at the recent shareholder meeting. See our latest analysis for O'Reilly Automotive. The recent Q1 update and governance news come after a period where short term share price momentum has eased, with a 30 day share price return that declined 0.66%, even as the 5 year total shareholder return of 160.40% has been much...
